news-global-econ.title: Iranian Official Defies Purported Message from Cardboard Khamenei, Says Strait of Hormuz Open
news-global-econ.description:
Iran's top diplomat at the United Nations declared Thursday, "We are not going to close the Strait of Hormuz."
The post Iranian Official Defies Purported Message from Cardboard Khamenei, Says Strait of Hormuz Open appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Fourth Quarter Growth Was Much Weaker Than Previously Thought
news-global-econ.description:
U.S. economic growth in the fourth quarter was much weaker than first reported, with revised data Friday showing gross domestic product rose at a 0.7 percent annual rate instead of the previously estimated 1.4 percent.

news-global-econ.title: Trump Tax Cuts Boost Income, Savings
news-global-econ.description:
Americans' disposable income surged in January as the Trump tax cuts began flowing through paychecks, boosting the personal saving rate while consumers held back on spending, according to data released Friday by the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

news-global-econ.description: Department of Labor releases proposed rule using economic reality test to help employers determine worker classification under Fair Labor Standards Act.

news-global-soc.description: Pima County Sheriff Chris nanos warns Nancy Guthrie's suspected kidnapper could strike again as "Today" co-host's mom remains missing 40 days later.

news-global-soc.title: VICTORY GARDEN: Cut grocery bills and healthcare costs with one simple backyard habit
news-global-soc.description: Rising grocery prices got you down? This compelling case for bringing back food literacy and home gardens could slash your grocery bills significantly.

news-global-soc.title: Ex-NFL star Shawne Merriman advocating for players to get paid more when TV rights deals explode
news-global-soc.description: The NFL reportedly wants a new media rights deal done by the start of the 2026 season, and one former player believes the current ones should be getting paid.
